title: USD
text: The US dollar is gaining strength amid escalating Middle East tensions, with the 'Iran War Restores King Dollar's Crown, For Now' as investors seek safe-haven assets.

title: EUR/USD
text: European Stocks are falling due to inflation concerns and Middle East tensions, which may lead to a decline in the euro against the US dollar.

title: Oil
text: Oil prices are expected to be higher for longer due to the ongoing conflict, potentially impacting currency markets and commodity-linked currencies like the CAD and AUD.

title: CNY
text: The PBoC is seen resisting strong appreciation of the Chinese yuan, according to Commerzbank, which may influence trade and currency markets.

title: Market Sentiment
text: Investor nervousness exists amid the West Asia conflict, and US Indices are watching key support zones as war tensions escalate, which may lead to increased market volatility.
